bio: 6th semester CSE student at MITRC, Alwar — shipping AI/ML products, full-stack apps, and open-source tools. I don't wait for the degree. Pursuing a serious GenAI Engineer path: RAG systems, agentic workflows, vector databases, and LLM API development.

projects.title: GhostAudit
projects.summary: B2B SaaS tool that detects and visualizes cloud cost leaks in ML infrastructure. Scans AWS for idle resources, orphaned storage, and wasteful compute.

projects.title: TruthLens
projects.summary: Detects sycophancy in AI chatbots. Chrome extension with three-layer proxy architecture that intercepts API traffic and scores responses for over-agreeableness.

projects.title: LSTM System Optimizer
projects.summary: Predicts CPU and memory usage patterns using LSTM neural networks, enabling proactive resource allocation before bottlenecks occur.

projects.title: GST Notice Explainer
projects.summary: LLM-powered wrapper that explains GST notices to Indian SMBs in plain Hindi/English and suggests next steps. Revenue-first wrapper product.

projects.title: ElectroAI
projects.summary: Hyper-narrow AI assistant for Indian electricians — accessible via WhatsApp, trained on Indian electrical codes. 18-month build.

projects.title: AlgoViz
projects.summary: Interactive visualizer for 8 sorting algorithms. Used by classmates for exam prep.

blog.title: Why I built a sycophancy detector (and what it found)
blog.excerpt: AI assistants are trained to please. I got tired of not knowing when they were doing it, so I built TruthLens to score every response.

blog.title: The three AI skills nobody talks about but everyone needs
blog.excerpt: LLM security, AI evals, and inference optimization — the underrated skills that separate junior AI devs from the ones who get hired.

blog.title: How I went from DSA exam prep to shipping a B2B SaaS product
blog.excerpt: Building GhostAudit alongside semester exams taught me more about product thinking than any textbook. Here's the honest story.
